response.justification: Strong, broad software engineering background with 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop and embedded, plus genuine open-source and Linux depth (GISCollective, D-lang tooling) that aligns well with the open-source/digital-sovereignty focus. However, two requirements are weakly met: German is listed only as Basic against a hard C1 minimum, and the career is predominantly individual-contributor (Staff/Senior Engineer) rather than formal development leadership or team management. UML/modeling and IT security/risk/compliance experience are not evidenced. Worth a conversation mainly to verify German level and leadership scope, which are decisive for this role.
strengths: Extensive modern software development experience across many stacks and domains
Strong open-source and Linux/Unix background, including founding an open-source platform
Demonstrated communication/teaching through talks, workshops, and courses
concerns: German listed as Basic, far below the required C1 minimum
Mostly individual-contributor roles; limited formal team leadership or project management
No evidence of UML modeling or IT security/risk/compliance experience
